headlines.h: Opinion: My mom just sent me this😹 (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.

headlines.h: Markets React To: Sorry to bother you
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-03-15)

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “Funny Cat memes"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
